chapters.title: 标　语
chapters.content:
一九九五十二月冬季训练标语
一个寻求基督者的生活
The Living of a Christ-Seeker
受基督的爱所吸引，被祂的名所迷住，为祂的人位所夺取，而追求祂，并被带进召会生活中。
Attracted by Christ's love, charmed by His name, and captivated by His person to pursue Him and be led into the church life.
蒙呼召驻留于十字架，好脱离她内顾自己的己，而得以在神圣的生命中，完成她良人对她的目的。
Called to remain in the cross that she may be freed from her introspective self for the fulfilling of her Beloved's purpose concerning her in the divine life.
蒙呼召在升天里，甚至在幔子内过生活，好经历更厉害的十字架，使她甚至在被提前就在她灵里与神成为一。
Called to live in ascension and even within the veil to experience the stronger cross that she may be one with God in her spirit even before rapture.
至终被模成奇妙的书拉密女，作所罗门的复本，成为那作基督对耦之新耶路撒冷最大并终极的表号。
Conformed, ultimately, to be the wonderful Shulammite, who, as the duplication of Solomon, is the greatest and ultimate figure of the New Jerusalem as the counterpart of Christ.
